column1: ... he received the telegram, he started.
... he finished his work, he went out.
... she left, she gave everyone a present.
I waited ... 6 o’clock and then I went home.
I will wait ... I hear from you.
I came home ... I heard the news.
... my dad sleeps, nothing can wake him up.
... I was relaxing at the hotel, Tom and John were surfing over the waves.
Phil was trying to mend his car ... his brother was curiously watching him.
